generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values both security and civil liberties, I've been following the recent debates on domestic security powers. It's clear that our current framework is outdated. The 2023 London attacks showed how crucial real-time data access is for preventing tragedies. While some worry about overreach, the new proposals actually include robust oversight mechanisms. Our allies like Germany and Japan have similar systems without compromising freedoms. It's time to modernize our approach - we can have both safety and rights. #SmartSecurity #BalancedApproach
